steps.action: Lavani is a combination of traditional song and with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat.
steps.text: Lavani is a combination of traditional song and with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat.

steps.action: Lavani is noted for its powerful rhythm.
steps.text: Lavani is noted for its powerful rhythm.

steps.action: Lavani has contributed substantially to the deve
steps.text: Lavani has contributed substantially to the development of Marathi folk theatre.

steps.action: In Maharashtra and southern Madhya Pradesh it is
steps.text: In Maharashtra and southern Madhya Pradesh it is performed by the female performers wearing nine-yard long sarees also called Lugade saree.

steps.action: Lavani dancers were patronised by Maratha Lords
steps.text: Lavani dancers were patronised by Maratha Lords and Kings.

steps.action: Lavani dance was generally performed by Dhangars
steps.text: Lavani dance was generally performed by Dhangars or Shepherd living in Solapur, Maharashtra.

steps.action: Lavani Songs, which are sung along with dance, a
steps.text: Lavani Songs, which are sung along with dance, are usually naughty and erotic in nature.

steps.action: It is a kind of Mujra strictly performed for men
steps.text: It is a kind of Mujra strictly performed for men and away from the village with no access for ladies or families to watch.

steps.action: The dancers form a bun (juda in Hindi or ambada
steps.text: The dancers form a bun (juda in Hindi or ambada in Marathi) in their hair.

steps.action: The Lavani poet out-steps the limits of social d
steps.text: The Lavani poet out-steps the limits of social decency and control when it comes to the depiction of sexual passion.

steps.action: Ayyappapanicker, Sahitya Akademi Men who dance i
steps.text: Ayyappapanicker, Sahitya Akademi Men who dance in Lavani along with the women lead dancer are called nat or the kinnars.

steps.action: Lokshahir Bashir Momin Kavathekar was a popular
steps.text: Lokshahir Bashir Momin Kavathekar was a popular choice amongst the famous Lavani Dancers and his compositions had been presented on stage by various artists like Ms.

steps.action: His folk songs & Lavani's enthralled the audienc
steps.text: His folk songs & Lavani's enthralled the audiences, helped in sustaining popularity of the 'Tamasha' and earned him 'Vithabai Narayangavkar Lifetime Achievement Award' for his lifelong contribution.

steps.action: Honaji Bala introduced tabla in place of the tra
steps.text: Honaji Bala introduced tabla in place of the traditional dholki.

steps.action: Many Lavani dancers are from some castes of Maha
steps.text: Many Lavani dancers are from some castes of Maharashtra like Mahar Kolhati, and Matang.

steps.action: Movies such as Pinjara and Natarang not only att
steps.text: Movies such as Pinjara and Natarang not only attempted to blend traditional music with social messages but also helped portray Lavani in a positive light.

steps.action: Lavani is a genre of music popular in Maharashtr
steps.text: Lavani is a genre of music popular in Maharashtra, India.

steps.action: The songs are sung in a quick tempo.
steps.text: The songs are sung in a quick tempo.

steps.action: The songs in 'Lavani' are mostly emotional in se
steps.text: The songs in 'Lavani' are mostly emotional in sentiment and the dialogues tend to be pungent in socio-political satire.

steps.action: Originally, it was used as a form of entertainme
steps.text: Originally, it was used as a form of entertainment and morale booster to the tired soldiers.

steps.action: It is believed their origin is in the Prakrit Ga
steps.text: It is believed their origin is in the Prakrit Gathas collected by Hala.

steps.action: The Nirguni Lavani (philosophical) and the Shrin
steps.text: The Nirguni Lavani (philosophical) and the Shringari Lavani (sensual) are the two types.

steps.action: The devotional music of the Nirguni cult is popu
steps.text: The devotional music of the Nirguni cult is popular all over Malwa.

steps.action: Lavani developed into two distinct performances,
steps.text: Lavani developed into two distinct performances, namely Phadachi Lavani and Baithakichi Lavani.
